title: Oceaniopteris obtusata
taxonomy: Oceaniopteris obtusata belongs to the division Pteridophyta and the class Polypodiopsida. It is further classified under the order Cyatheales, and the family Cyatheaceae. This classification suggests its close relationship to other ferns within the same family and order. The genus Oceaniopteris also indicates its specific characteristics and evolutionary history. Oceaniopteris obtusata is a part of the larger group of vascular plants, which have evolved complex structures for transport and support.
